channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alberta's Pipeline Proposal and Separatist Tensions at the Calgary Stampede
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith and Prime Minister Mark Carney jointly announced support for a new bitumen pipeline to southern B.C., aiming to counter separatist sentiment in the oil-rich province. Th...

item.title: Kolisi Calls for National Unity as Springboks Prepare for England Match
item.description: The article discusses the Springboks' opening Test match against England in Johannesburg, highlighting concerns over ticket sales. Initially, only 21,000 tickets were sold for the 65,000-seater Ellis ...

item.title: Comelec Cancels Candidate's Eligibility in BARMM Elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has canceled the certificate of candidacy (COC) of Anwar Salipada Alamada, a candidate under the United Bangsamoro Justice Party (UBJP), for the first Bangsamoro ...

item.title: Kwara Police Arrest Three Suspects in Student Murder Case
item.description: The Kwara State Police Command has confirmed the arrest of three suspects linked to the alleged abduction and murder of a student at the state Polytechnic in Ilorin. The suspects, members of the Eiye ...

item.title: LGBT cruise faces restrictions as Turkey blocks port calls
item.description: A long-planned LGBT cruise organized by Virgin Voyages has encountered significant obstacles as Turkish authorities have canceled its planned stop in the country. The provincial government cited align...

item.title: BOC enforces strict one-strike policy vs corruption and smuggling activities
item.description: Bureau of Customs (BOC) Commissioner Ariel Nepomuceno has announced the implementation of a strict one-strike policy targeting personnel involved in corruption and illegal activities. The policy is pa...

item.title: NAHCO Announces Board Restructuring with Director Retirements and New Expert Appointments
item.description: Nigerian Aviation Handling Company Plc (NAHCO PLC) has announced significant changes to its Board of Directors following the retirement of two long-serving members and the appointment of legal and fin...

item.title: Chery's New South African Assembly Plant to Produce Local Models
item.description: Chery Auto has officially inaugurated its new assembly plant in Rosslyn, Gauteng, marking a significant shift in South Africa's automotive landscape. The plant, previously used for Nissan Navara produ...

item.title: Argentina advances to World Cup round of 16 after extra-time win over Cape Verde
item.description: Argentina narrowly avoided a stunning upset in the World Cup 2026 as they defeated Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time to progress to the round of 16. The match, held in South Florida, saw the defending cham...

item.title: Small plane crash in High River leaves two injured
item.description: A small plane crash in High River, Alberta, has resulted in two injuries, according to local news reports. The incident, which occurred on July 3, 2026, involved a single-engine aircraft that crashed ...

item.title: Egypt Advances in FIFA World Cup 2026 with Penalty Shootout Victory
item.description: In the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 clash between Egypt and Australia, the Pharaohs secured a historic victory through a penalty shootout. Egypt's Emam Ashour opened the scoring with a header from ...

item.title: Dispute Over Demolition Delays at Boyle Heights Warehouse Sparks Community Concern
item.description: Lineage, the company managing a fire-ravaged cold storage warehouse in Boyle Heights, accused Altus Power of delaying demolition efforts following a June 17 blaze suspected to have been sparked by the...

item.title: UK Braces for Heatwave with Temperatures Exceeding 30°C into July
item.description: The UK is set to experience another heatwave, with temperatures forecast to exceed 30°C in parts of southern and south-eastern England, potentially reaching 33°C. This weather event, which could last ...

item.title: Kwara State Court Sets Arraignment for Ex-Senate President Saraki Over Defamation Claims
item.description: A Kwara State High Court in Ilorin has scheduled July 22, 2026, for the arraignment of former Senate President Bukola Saraki on charges of criminal defamation against Governor AbdulRahman AbdulRazaq. ...

item.title: Supreme Court rejects plea to revoke bail granted to Sonam Raghuvanshi
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has expressed criticism towards the High Court's decision to grant bail to Sonam Raghuvanshi, a woman accused in a high-profile legal case, but has refused to revoke the ord...

item.title: Guidelines for Ensuring Children's Online Safety During School Breaks
item.description: As schools close for the holiday season, children increasingly rely on digital devices for entertainment, which exposes them to risks like cyberbullying, inappropriate content, and online predators. E...

item.title: India seeks Venezuela's investigation into sailor's death with missing organs post-autopsy
item.description: Rakesh Chauhan, a 33-year-old Indian seafarer, died in Venezuela's Falcón state on May 7 after a heart attack, according to a medical certificate. However, an autopsy conducted in Uttar Pradesh after ...

item.title: Argentina advances to World Cup round of 16 after extra-time victory over Cape Verde
item.description: Argentina secured a dramatic 3-2 victory over Cape Verde in a World Cup match that stretched into extra time, advancing to the round of 16. The game, held in Miami, saw the reigning champions face a f...

item.title: ICC Partially Grants Access to Duterte's Arrest Items, Rejects Key Requests
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) has partially granted prosecutors' request to access certain materials related to former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte's case. In a redacted decision, the...

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bots with access restrictions
item.description: News Corp Australia has implemented measures to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites, resulting in some users being blocked. The article explains that if a user receives a message indicating the...
